title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker19: Kconfig.defconfig
close_reason: Resolved merge conflict in lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/Kconfig.defconfig by consolidating LICHEN_HAS_DISPLAY selects, adding LVGL heap tuning, using INPUT_LILYGO_TDECK_KEYBOARD driver, cleaned related bridge overlay and t_deck conf comments. Also resolved multiple unmerged paths in main merge. Commit 9a31e2274 pushed to main.
